title: Display activity timeline on history icon click

requirements.text: When the history icon is clicked in the ActivitySection component, display the ActivityTimeline component with the exact visual design shown in the uploaded image: vertical timeline with circular markers, connecting lines, timestamps on the left, and colored comment boxes (light blue, light purple, light green) with single-sentence text

quotes: when you click the history icon, display the activity timeline that looks exactly like in the uploaded image

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the history icon toggles the ActivityTimeline visibility
Timeline displays with vertical line connecting circular markers
Each activity shows timestamp in 'DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM' format on the left
Activity comments appear in colored boxes (alternating light blue, light purple, light green)
Layout matches the uploaded reference image structure

requirements.text: Update dummy comments data to be exactly one short sentence each, matching the concise style shown in the uploaded image examples

quotes: keep the dummy comments 1 sentence short

acceptanceCriteria: All dummy comments in dummyComments.ts are reduced to single short sentences
Comment text length is similar to examples: 'Payment arrangement agreed upon', 'Confirmed payment received, updating records', 'Customer disputed amount, escalating to supervisor'

nonGoals: Changing the backend Activity data structure
Adding new activity types or categories
